quality.content:
# Quality Report

- Status: reject
- Quality Score: 21.0
- Hard failures: 1
- Issues: 18
- Source available: True
- Source changed: False
- Source segments: 25
- Target segments: 26

## Scorecard

| Dimension | Score |
| --- | ---: |
| adequacy | 0.0 |
| technical_accuracy | 80.0 |
| completeness | 0.0 |
| terminology | 40.0 |
| fluency | 85.0 |
| publishing_integrity | 60.0 |
| style_locale | 69.0 |

## Metrics

- qe_metric: heuristic
- qe_average: 0.7097
- qe_min: 0.2458
- embedding_similarity_average: 0.5922
- embedding_similarity_min: 0.007
- cache_hits: 0
- cache_misses: 50

## MQM Judge

- Enabled: False
- Provider: `off`
- Requested segments: 0
- Evaluated segments: 0
- MQM errors: 0
- Cache hits: 0
- Cache misses: 0

## Style Guide

- Enabled: True
- Guide: `/home/runner/work/hugging-face-krew.github.io/hugging-face-krew.github.io/workflow/skills/quality/style/hf-blog-ko-translation-guide.md`
- Policy: `/home/runner/work/hugging-face-krew.github.io/hugging-face-krew.github.io/workflow/skills/quality/configs/style_policy.yml`
- Style score: 69.0
- Rule hits: {'information_addition': 1, 'modal_strength': 2, 'translationese': 1}

## Style Guide Findings

| Rule | Severity | Segment | Current | Suggested |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| translationese | minor |  | 에 의해 | Rewrite the sentence in natural Korean. |
| modal_strength | major | h_022 | 비대칭성 문제 | Preserve the strength of `can` using: 수 있습니다. |
| modal_strength | major | p_023 | 로그 분석을 시작했을 때, 먼저 상용 API 뒤에 있는 프런티어 모델을 사용했습니다. 이는 작동하지 않았습니다: 이 분석은 실제 공격 명령, 익스플로잇 페이로드, C2 산물을 대량으로 제출해야 하는데, 이러한 요청은 공급자의 안전 가드레일에 의해 차단되었고, 이는 사고 대응자를 공격자와 구분할 수 없었습니다. 대신 GLM 5.2 오픈-가중치 모델을 우리 인프라에서 포렌식 분석으로 실행했습니다. 이는 또 하나의 이점으로, 공격자 데이터나 그것이 참조한 자격 증명이 우리 환경을 벗어나지 않았다는 점입니다. | Preserve the strength of `can` using: 수 있습니다. |
| information_addition | major | p_020 | 덕분에 | Remove invented causal explanation unless the source explicitly states it. |

## Issues

### QL-001 formatting / critical

- Message: Front matter key `thumbnail` changed or is missing.
- Source: `/blog/assets/security-incident-july-2026/thumbnail.png`
- Suggested fix: Preserve front matter `thumbnail` exactly.

### QL-002 formatting / major

- Message: bare URL mismatch.
- Target: `https://huggingface.co/blog/security-incident-july-2026`
- Suggested fix: Preserve source bare URL exactly.
- Reason: Review gate exact-match validator failed: extra=['https://huggingface.co/blog/security-incident-july-2026']

### QL-003 technical / major

- Message: number/unit token mismatch.
- Target: `1, 24, 7`
- Suggested fix: Preserve source number/unit token exactly.
- Reason: Review gate exact-match validator failed: extra=['1', '24', '7']

### QL-004 accuracy / major

- Message: Target has additional text segments.
- Source: `source_segments=25`
- Target: `target_segments=26`
- Suggested fix: Check for duplicated or invented paragraphs.
- Reason: Segment count validator found more target text segments than source text segments.

### QL-005 accuracy / major

- Message: QE metric score is low.
- Target: `0.2458`
- Suggested fix: Review this segment for omission, unrelated translation, or over-compression.
- Reason: QE score is below threshold 0.55.

### QL-006 accuracy / major

- Message: QE metric score is low.
- Target: `0.3157`
- Suggested fix: Review this segment for omission, unrelated translation, or over-compression.
- Reason: QE score is below threshold 0.55.

### QL-007 accuracy / minor

- Message: Embedding similarity is an outlier.
- Target: `0.0365`
- Suggested fix: Review whether the segment still corresponds to the source.
- Reason: Embedding similarity is below threshold 0.08.

### QL-008 accuracy / major

- Message: QE metric score is low.
- Target: `0.5162`
- Suggested fix: Review this segment for omission, unrelated translation, or over-compression.
- Reason: QE score is below threshold 0.55.

### QL-009 accuracy / major

- Message: QE metric score is low.
- Target: `0.2626`
- Suggested fix: Review this segment for omission, unrelated translation, or over-compression.
- Reason: QE score is below threshold 0.55.

### QL-010 accuracy / minor

- Message: Embedding similarity is an outlier.
- Target: `0.0070`
- Suggested fix: Review whether the segment still corresponds to the source.
- Reason: Embedding similarity is below threshold 0.08.

### QL-011 terminology / major

- Message: Product or library name was not preserved.
- Source: `Hugging Face`
- Suggested fix: Preserve `Hugging Face` exactly.
- Reason: Glossary policy requires preserving this product/library/model term.

### QL-012 terminology / major

- Message: Product or library name was not preserved.
- Source: `Datasets`
- Suggested fix: Preserve `Datasets` exactly.
- Reason: Glossary policy requires preserving this product/library/model term.

### QL-013 terminology / major

- Message: Product or library name was not preserved.
- Source: `Spaces`
- Suggested fix: Preserve `Spaces` exactly.
- Reason: Glossary policy requires preserving this product/library/model term.

### QL-014 fluency / minor

- Message: Translationese expression found.
- Target: `에 의해`
- Suggested fix: Rewrite the sentence in natural Korean.
- Reason: The style guide lists this expression as translationese to avoid.

### QL-015 accuracy / major

- Message: Modal or certainty strength may have changed.
- Source: `can`
- Target: `비대칭성 문제`
- Suggested fix: Preserve the strength of `can` using: 수 있습니다.
- Reason: The style guide requires preserving may/can/should/must/up to/in some cases/not always strength.

### QL-016 accuracy / major

- Message: Modal or certainty strength may have changed.
- Source: `can`
- Target: `로그 분석을 시작했을 때, 먼저 상용 API 뒤에 있는 프런티어 모델을 사용했습니다. 이는 작동하지 않았습니다: 이 분석은 실제 공격 명령, 익스플로잇 페이로드, C2 산물을 대량으로 제출해야 하는데, 이러한 요청은 공급자의 안전 가드레일에 의해 차단되었고, 이는 사고 대응자를 공격자와 구분할 수 없었습니다. 대신 GLM 5.2 오픈-가중치 모델을 우리 인프라에서 포렌식 분석으로 실행했습니다. 이는 또 하나의 이점으로, 공격자 데이터나 그것이 참조한 자격 증명이 우리 환경을 벗어나지 않았다는 점입니다.`
- Suggested fix: Preserve the strength of `can` using: 수 있습니다.
- Reason: The style guide requires preserving may/can/should/must/up to/in some cases/not always strength.

### QL-017 accuracy / major

- Message: Translation may add a causal explanation that is not in the source.
- Target: `덕분에`
- Suggested fix: Remove invented causal explanation unless the source explicitly states it.
- Reason: The style guide forbids adding technical explanations, reasons, examples, or conclusions.

### QL-018 accuracy / major

- Message: Semantic adequacy evaluation is incomplete.
- Suggested fix: Complete MQM evaluation for every aligned segment before auto-passing.
- Reason: Heuristic QE only checks surface signals and cannot establish semantic equivalence.
